gate: Semantic: SplyCur is issued supply, not circulating float
evidence: DF-01-E04 (schema/semantics audit: SplyCur issued supply field), DF-01-E10 (Coin Metrics source note)
notes: The Coin Metrics Community field `SplyCur` represents issued/current supply, not circulating float. Historically authoritative circulating supply requires float-adjusted methodology that is not present. Semantic failure: the retained field cannot serve as circulating supply. Blocking.

gate: Coverage: BTC/SUSHI observed; BONK/micro-cap Community absent
evidence: DF-01-E03 (source object inventory), DF-01-E02 (source decision register)
notes: BTC and SUSHI observations exist in the accepted inventory, but BONK and broader micro-cap Community coverage are absent. Coverage is partial and cannot support a general PIT supply universe. Blocking.
No retained record bounds the lag between on-chain event time and Coin Metrics publication/known-time. Without a bounded lag, point-in-time correctness cannot be asserted. Blocking.

gate: Revision: server-side revisions/backfills exist, no retained historical vintages
evidence: DF-01-E05 (correction/revision audit), DF-01-E08 (evidence reconciliation), DF-01-E09 (hash verification)
notes: Server-side revisions and backfills exist, but no historical vintages of the data are retained in the repository. Reproducibility of a past value is impossible. Blocking.

gate: Provenance: request identities/hashes recorded; original raw bodies not retained
evidence: DF-01-E03 (inventory records request identities/hashes), DF-01-E08/E09 (only hashes retained), DF-01-E10 (source note)
notes: Request identities and SHA-256 hashes are recorded in the accepted inventory, but the original raw API response bodies are NOT repository-retained. Provenance is partial: we can verify the accepted artifacts, not the original responses. Blocking.

gate: Licensing: licensing and internal raw-retention authority not established
evidence: DF-01-E10 (Coin Metrics source note), DF-01-E07 (research lead decisions)
notes: The accepted evidence establishes no licensing grant nor internal raw-retention authority for Coin Metrics Community data. Authority to retain/use raw snapshots is unproven. Blocking.

gate: Reproducibility: no contemporaneously published historical value reproduced
notes: No contemporaneously published historical supply value was reproduced from retained artifacts; the original bodies needed to reproduce are absent (see G05). Blocking.

gate: Semantic: future unissued/max supply absent; FDV and denominator history unconstructable
evidence: DF-01-E03 (inventory lacks max/future supply), DF-01-E04 (schema lacks unissued fields)
notes: Future unissued / max supply series are absent from the retained inventory, so FDV and the required denominator history for supply-dependent metrics cannot be constructed. Semantic failure. Blocking.
